name: Zillow API
what_it_does: Zillow's property data API (Bridge Interactive) providing listing data, Zestimate home value estimates, rental estimates (Rent Zestimate), and market statistics. Access is restricted to approved partners.
use_cases: Retrieving property details and Zestimate values for real estate agents
Accessing active listing data for approved MLS/brokerage integrations
Market trend analysis using Zillow housing market data
Rental price estimation via Rent Zestimate for property investors
Building real estate search and comparison tools for approved partners
not_for: General developers — API is not publicly accessible, requires Zillow partnership
Competitor scraping or redistribution of Zillow data
Real-time transaction processing or MLS direct feeds
Non-approved use cases outside Zillow's partner terms
best_when: You are an approved Zillow partner (real estate broker, MLS, or tech partner) needing reliable property data and Zestimate values at scale.
avoid_when: You're a developer without a formal Zillow partnership — access will not be granted.

auth.notes: Bridge Interactive platform uses OAuth2 with partner credentials. Access requires formal partnership agreement with Zillow Group. Standard API keys for some legacy endpoints.

pricing.paid_tiers: Custom pricing through Zillow partnership agreements
pricing.notes: Pricing negotiated through Zillow Group partnership program. Not publicly available. Requires business justification and approval process.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Error quality is inconsistent. Some endpoints return clear messages while others return opaque codes. Documentation is fragmented across legacy and Bridge APIs.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All primary data endpoints are read-only GET requests — fully idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: API access requires formal Zillow partnership — not available to general developers
Legacy Zillow API (GetZestimate, etc.) was deprecated — only Bridge Interactive now
Zestimates have well-documented accuracy limitations — not reliable for precise valuations
Data licensing terms are strict — redistribution and competitive use prohibited
Documentation scattered across multiple legacy and current API portals
US only — no international property data
